calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment; Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Apr-29-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MARIAN SNELGRO'S MOTION TO VACATE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: The unopposed motion to vacate default and default judgment is granted for good cause shown in the moving papers. Defendant shall respond to the complaint within 20 days. Proposed order submitted for review. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (301/CVA)
